pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 15: SUBJECT="Drake Antiquities"; used in both historical and new case titles
setup_task.sh line 16: INVESTIGATOR="Elena Fisher"; referenced in historical case details as prior investigator
task.json description line 4-5 specifies exact note text: 'Conflict Detected: Elena Fisher involved in prior Case [OLD_CASE_ID]'; verifier.py line 68 checks for this pattern

privileged_info_summary: The task performs a conflict-of-interest check in ArkCase using synthetic data. A historical case titled 'Closed Investigation: Drake Antiquities - Import Audit 2022' is created with investigator 'Elena Fisher' listed in the case details. A new active case titled 'New Complaint: Drake Antiquities - Unlicensed Artifacts' is simultaneously created. The agent must add a note to the new case containing the exact text pattern 'Conflict Detected: Elena Fisher involved in prior Case [OLD_CASE_ID]' if a conflict is identified. Both case IDs are generated dynamically at task setup time via the ArkCase REST API.
